response.justification: James demonstrates extensive fullstack experience with strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js expertise, aligning well with the role's core requirements. However, his more senior-level positions and leadership roles may indicate a potential mismatch for an entry-level role. His AWS, Kubernetes, and LLM experience are valuable, though not directly matching all job requirements.
strengths: Deep fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React (directly relevant to the role)
Proven track record in scalable architecture, microservices, and database optimization (e.g., MongoDB, PostgreSQL alternatives)
Exposure to modern tooling (Kubernetes, AWS, Terraform) and AI/ML-related work (LLM integration)
concerns: Overqualified for an entry-level role due to extensive senior-level and leadership experience
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (used MongoDB predominantly in recent roles)
Higher salary expectations may not align with junior/mid-level compensation ranges
